title: Do not render badge text in uppercase by default
summary: AI-generated badges, tags, and status pills universally use uppercase or semibold text regardless of context, reducing readability especially for longer labels.
instruction: Use sentence case or title case for badge and label text. Reserve uppercase for short, single-word labels where the uppercase convention is established (e.g., 'NEW', 'BETA'). Ensure badge text maintains readability at small sizes.
rationale: Uppercase text in badges reduces readability, particularly at small sizes where AI typically renders badges (11-13px). The uppercase + pill shape + color combination is a template default that prioritizes visual uniformity over communication clarity.
violations: All badge text rendered in uppercase regardless of label length
Semibold or bold weight combined with uppercase in small badges
Labels like 'IN PROGRESS', 'PENDING REVIEW', 'AWAITING APPROVAL' in all-caps
Uppercase badges at 11-12px font size where readability is significantly reduced
controls: Sentence case or title case for badge labels
Regular weight text in badges for readability at small sizes
Caps only for established conventions (NEW, BETA, SALE) where users expect it
borderlineCases: Single-word badges like 'NEW', 'BETA', 'SALE' where uppercase is conventional
contextualExceptions: Brand guidelines that mandate uppercase label styling
detectorSignal: Small pill-shaped elements containing text in uppercase or small-caps CSS styling.
matcherProposal: Detect elements with badge/pill styling (rounded-full, small padding) where the text-transform is uppercase or the text content is in all-caps.
detectorLimitations: Cannot distinguish intentional uppercase branding from default template styling
falsePositiveScenarios: Brand guidelines that specify uppercase label styling
mitigationStrategy: Flag as a readability suggestion, particularly for multi-word labels where uppercase significantly impairs readability.

fixturePlans.violation: Status badges: 'IN PROGRESS' (green), 'AWAITING REVIEW' (yellow), 'APPROVED' (green) in 12px uppercase semibold.
fixturePlans.control: Status badges: 'In progress' (green), 'Awaiting review' (yellow), 'Approved' (green) in 12px regular weight sentence case.
fixturePlans.borderline: Single-word 'NEW' badge in uppercase where the convention supports it.

cleanRoomAttestations: Developed without access to proprietary prompt collections.
overlapNotes: Related to status.traffic-light-badges (P-CC-018) but focuses on typography specifically.
